title: cacalia rothii
intro: Cacalia rothii, also known as the 'Chinese Cacalia', is a perennial herbaceous plant native to China that belongs to the family Compositae (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and diuretic effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and relieving coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of Cacalia rothii include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions, with the recommended dosage varying depending on the specific application and individual needs.
